jaxlibxc
  • API Reference
  • Autodiff Engine
  • View page source

Autodiff Engine

The automatic differentiation engine that computes XC derivatives (vrho, vsigma, vtau, v2rho2, …) from energy density functions using jax.grad and jax.jacfwd.

Automatic differentiation engine for computing XC derivatives.

Given an energy_fn that returns zk (energy per electron), this module computes all derivatives (vrho, vsigma, vtau, v2rho2, …) using jax.grad and jax.jacfwd.

jaxlibxc._autodiff.compute_exc(energy_fn, params, family, polarized, inputs, thresholds)[source]

Compute energy density zk = eps_xc (per electron).

Parameters:

  • energy_fn – the functional’s energy function

  • params – parameter dict

  • family – Family enum

  • polarized – bool

  • inputs – dict with ‘rho’, optionally ‘sigma’, ‘lapl’, ‘tau’

  • thresholds – dict with ‘dens’, ‘sigma’, ‘tau’, ‘zeta’ thresholds

Returns:

array of shape (N, 1)

Return type:

zk

jaxlibxc._autodiff.compute_vxc_lda(energy_fn, params, polarized, inputs, thresholds)[source]

Compute 1st derivatives for LDA: vrho.

Returns dict with ‘vrho’.

jaxlibxc._autodiff.compute_vxc_gga(energy_fn, params, polarized, inputs, thresholds)[source]

Compute 1st derivatives for GGA: vrho, vsigma.

jaxlibxc._autodiff.compute_vxc_mgga(energy_fn, params, polarized, inputs, thresholds)[source]

Compute 1st derivatives for MGGA: vrho, vsigma, vlapl, vtau.

jaxlibxc._autodiff.compute_fxc_lda(energy_fn, params, polarized, inputs, thresholds)[source]

Compute 2nd derivatives for LDA: v2rho2.

jaxlibxc._autodiff.compute_fxc_gga(energy_fn, params, polarized, inputs, thresholds)[source]

Compute 2nd derivatives for GGA: v2rho2, v2rhosigma, v2sigma2.
